name: Guava Smoked
tagline: Texas-style BBQ smoked with Hawaiian guava wood — brisket and pulled pork that taste like nowhere else on earth.
mustOrder: pulled pork — guava wood gives it a subtle sweetness
talkStory: Started as pop-ups before landing a brick-and-mortar on Kapahulu. The concept — Texas low-and-slow technique with Hawaiian guava wood — is a genuinely local innovation you won't find on the mainland. The smoke flavor is distinct: a little sweeter, a little more floral than mesquite or hickory. Portions are solid for the price. Your map has no BBQ representation — this fills that gap. Closed Mondays.
